remarks: Stylishly Renovated Victorian in the Heart of SONO  This fully reimagined 1 Bedroom Duplex + Loft blends timeless charm with today's modern finishes. Step inside to an open floor plan with sleek wood-look vinyl flooring, a designer kitchen featuring stainless steel appliances, marble backsplash, and plenty of space to entertain. The renovated bathroom showcases a walk-in shower with custom glass doors and a chic half bath tucked into the oversized second bedroom/office combo. Everything has been freshly painted in a contemporary palette, move right in and enjoy. Outside, relax on your welcoming front porch, and park stress. free with 1 reserved off-street spot. Prime SONO location: 1 block to the waterfront, 2 blocks to Metro North, and just steps to the best dining, shopping, and nightlife. Quick access to I-95 for an easy commute. Ask about longer term leases.  Only 1 month security with good credit Water, garbage, landscaping & parking included Pets welcome This one has it all modern updates, historic charm, and a walk-to-everything lifestyle!  Standard one year lease. Ask me about possible longer term options.
